headline: Your Metabolism,
hero_subtext_1: Feel like your body doesn't respond like it used to? You're not alone. After 40, metabolism slows down—but it doesn't have to stay that way.
hero_subtext_2: Veluna combines plant-based ingredients that support your body's natural metabolic processes. More energy. Better digestion. Fewer cravings. All without stimulants or harsh chemicals.

benefits_paragraphs: Remember when you could eat what you wanted and still feel energized? When digestion felt effortless, and your body seemed to work with you, not against you? That natural balance doesn't have to be a thing of the past.

As we age, our cellular processes slow down. The result? Sluggish digestion. Afternoon energy crashes. Cravings that feel impossible to ignore. Your body isn't broken—it just needs the right support to function optimally.

Veluna works with your body's natural systems. InnoSlim®, our proprietary blend, combined with EGCG-rich Green Tea Extract and Choline, helps support healthy metabolic function—so you can feel like yourself again.
urgency_text: Try it risk-free with our 60-day guarantee
features_subheadline: Every ingredient is carefully selected, tested for purity, and included at effective levels.

features.title: InnoSlim® Proprietary Blend
features.description: Our signature combination of Panax Notoginseng and Astragalus extracts, researched for metabolic support and cellular energy.

features.title: Green Tea Extract (50% EGCG)
features.description: High-concentration EGCG provides antioxidant support and helps your body maintain healthy energy metabolism naturally.

features.title: Choline Bitartrate
features.description: An essential nutrient that supports liver function and helps your body process fats efficiently for sustained energy.

features.title: Astragalus Root
features.description: A traditional botanical that supports immune function and helps your body maintain resilience during stressful periods.

features.title: Panax Notoginseng
features.description: Known for supporting healthy circulation and natural energy—without the jitters of stimulants.

science_steps.text: Plant compounds in Veluna help support your body's natural energy production at the cellular level—so you feel more vibrant throughout the day.
EGCG and Choline work together to support healthy fat metabolism and help your body use nutrients more effectively.
When your metabolism works better, cravings naturally decrease. Users report feeling more in control of their eating choices.

science_result: The result? More energy, better digestion, and a body that feels balanced and responsive—not sluggish and stuck.

reviews.body: After 3 weeks, I noticed a real difference. More energy throughout the day, better digestion after meals, and fewer afternoon cravings. My body finally feels like it's working with me again.
reviews.name: Monika S., Munich, Germany

reviews.body: I've tried so many supplements before, but this one is different. No jitters, no crash—just steady, natural energy. The difference in how I feel after meals is remarkable.
reviews.name: Thomas K., Berlin, Germany

reviews.body: After 4 weeks, my digestion feels normal again. More energy, less bloating, and I'm not constantly thinking about food. The 60-day guarantee made trying it an easy decision.
reviews.name: Sandra R., Hamburg, Germany

faq_items.question: How does Veluna support my metabolism?
faq_items.answer: Veluna contains plant-based compounds that support your body's natural metabolic processes. InnoSlim®, our proprietary blend, combined with EGCG from green tea and Choline, helps support cellular energy, healthy fat metabolism, and balanced digestion—all key factors in how your body processes and uses energy.

faq_items.question: How should I take Veluna?
faq_items.answer: For best results, take one capsule daily with a meal—morning or evening, whichever works best for your routine. Consistency is key. Most customers notice the first changes within 2–3 weeks of daily use.

faq_items.question: When will I notice a difference?
faq_items.answer: Most people report noticing improvements in energy and digestion within 2–3 weeks. Changes in cravings and overall well-being typically become more noticeable after 4–8 weeks of consistent daily use. Individual results vary based on diet, activity, and starting point.

faq_items.question: Are there any side effects?
faq_items.answer: Veluna is made with 100% plant-based ingredients and is generally well-tolerated. It contains no stimulants, so you won't experience jitters or crashes. If you have known allergies to any ingredient, check the label carefully. Pregnant or nursing women should consult their healthcare provider before use.

faq_items.question: Can I take Veluna with other supplements or medications?
faq_items.answer: Veluna is a natural dietary supplement. If you're taking any medications—especially for blood sugar, blood pressure, or blood thinning—we recommend consulting your healthcare provider before adding any new supplement to your routine.

faq_items.question: What is your guarantee policy?
faq_items.answer: We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied, contact us within 60 days of purchase for a full refund—no questions asked. We're confident in our product, and we want you to feel confident trying it.

footer_description: Veluna is a premium wellness supplement designed to support metabolic health, natural energy, and digestive wellness. Developed to the highest quality standards in German laboratories.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Effective: April 2026. This Privacy Policy explains how Vivello Solutions Ltd ('we', 'us', or 'our') collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit this website.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, billing address, payment information) and automatically (IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, cookies, and referring URLs). We may also receive data from third-party analytics and advertising partners.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to: process and fulfill orders; communicate about your order status; provide customer support; send promotional emails (you may unsubscribe at any time); analyze site traffic and improve user experience; comply with legal obligations; and prevent fraud.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies including Google Analytics (traffic analysis), Meta Pixel (advertising retargeting), and session cookies (shopping cart). You can control cookie settings through your browser. Opting out of analytics cookies will not affect your ability to use the site.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Data Sharing
sections.content: We do NOT sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We share data only with: payment processors (to complete transactions); shipping providers (to deliver your order); analytics providers (Google Analytics, in anonymized form); advertising platforms (Meta, Google – for retargeting, using hashed data only). All third parties are contractually bound to protect your data.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill orders, comply with legal obligations, and resolve disputes. Transaction records are typically kept for 5 years. You may request deletion of your data at any time (subject to legal retention requirements).

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.content: All data transmitted between your browser and our server is encrypted using SSL/TLS. We employ industry-standard security practices including access controls and secure server infrastructure. No system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content: EU/UK residents have the right to: access what personal data we collect; request deletion; restrict processing; data portability; and object to processing. To exercise any right, email us at support@getnutrivea.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.content: This website is not directed at children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us immediately for deletion.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at: support@getnutrivea.com. We respond to all privacy requests within 30 days.

modals.title: Returns & Guarantee Policy
modals.intro: We want you to be completely satisfied. Please read our refund policy carefully before placing your order.

sections.heading: Satisfaction Guarantee
sections.content: All purchases of Veluna are covered by a 60-day money-back guarantee. If for any reason you are not satisfied, you may request a full refund within 60 days of your purchase date, no questions asked.

sections.heading: How to Request a Refund
sections.content: To initiate a refund: (1) Email support@getnutrivea.com with the subject line 'Refund Request'; (2) Include your full name, order number, and the email address used to place the order; (3) You will receive a confirmation and return instructions within 1–2 business days.

sections.heading: Refund Eligibility
sections.content: Opened and partially used bottles are accepted for refund within the guarantee window. You do not need to return the product in some cases – we will confirm this in our response. Shipping and handling charges are non-refundable. Products purchased outside of the guarantee window are not eligible for refunds.

sections.heading: Processing Timeline
sections.content: Once your refund is approved, it will be processed within 5–10 business days. Please allow an additional 3–5 business days for your bank or card issuer to reflect the credit on your statement.

sections.heading: Damaged or Incorrect Items
sections.content: If you received a damaged, defective, or incorrect item, please contact us within 7 days of delivery with a description and photo of the issue. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you.

sections.heading: Important Note
sections.content: To ensure your order qualifies for the full money-back guarantee, always purchase through the official product link on this page. Third-party marketplace purchases may not be covered by the same guarantee terms.

modals.title: Contact Us
modals.intro: We are here to help. Please reach out using the information below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

sections.heading: Customer Support Email
sections.content: For all inquiries, including order status, refund requests, and general questions, please email us at: support@getnutrivea.com

sections.heading: Response Time
sections.content: We aim to respond to all customer inquiries within 1–2 business days. During peak periods, responses may take up to 3 business days. We appreciate your patience.

sections.heading: Business Hours
sections.content: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central European Time (CET). We are closed on weekends and major European public holidays.

sections.heading: Refund & Order Inquiries
sections.content: When contacting us about an order or refund, please include your order number and the email address used at checkout. This helps us locate your account and resolve your issue faster.

sections.heading: About This Website
sections.content: This website is operated by Vivello Solutions Ltd, an independent authorized distributor of Veluna. We are not the manufacturer. For manufacturer-level support, you may also contact the brand directly via their official website.
